message:
fix(python): max_weight_matching was calling min_weight_matching

The Python binding for max_weight_matching was incorrectly calling
fnx_algorithms::min_weight_matching instead of
fnx_algorithms::max_weight_matching. This caused it to return
minimum-weight matchings instead of maximum-weight ones.

Also fixed: to_scipy_sparse_array doubled self-loop weights for
undirected graphs (coo_array sums duplicates). Added i != j guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
